name: Cranberry Scones
recipeIngredient: 1 stick cold unsalted butter, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Measure buttermilk into a 2-cup glass measure.
3. Beat egg with a fork.
4. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Stir in the butter until the mixture resembles fine granules.
6. Add cranberries, sugar, and orange peel; toss lightly to distribute evenly.
7. Mix in the buttermilk and egg.
8. Form the dough into a ball.
9. Cut the dough into 8 wedges.
10. Place each wedge on an ungreased cookie sheet.
11. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until medium brown.
12. Transfer scones to a wire rack.
13. Brush with softened butter.
14. Allow cooling, uncovered, at least 1 hour before serving.
15. Serve with jams, jellies, plain yogurt, or lemon yogurt. Makes 8 scones.
